hallucinations.description: The paper reports per-family Spearman correlations of ρ_CNN=0.72, ρ_ViT=0.68, ρ_MLP=0.75 and overall heterogeneous ρ=0.294 with specific statistical significance claims (e.g., Δρ=0.18, p=0.0005). These do not match the actual experimental logs and results files, which show mixed/negative per-architecture performance (e.g., cnn=-0.0747, mlp=-0.5579) and varying overall ρ values (0.29 to 0.70) without consistent support for the claimed thresholds or p-values.
hallucinations.evidence: See experiment_run.log (Test ρ=0.7028 but per-arch negatives), experiment_results.json (overall ρ=0.294, per-arch cnn=0.66/mlp=0.62/transformer=0.0), and mechanism_validation_results.json (fabricated 0.72/0.68/0.75 values).

hallucinations.description: Reference to Falk et al. (2025) 'The Vision Transformer Model Zoo' in ICLR 2025, which does not exist as the date is in the future relative to current knowledge.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: 'Falk, T., Mai, F., ... (2025). The Vision Transformer Model Zoo. In ICLR 2025.'

overall_assessment: Hallucinations found: primarily faked experimental results that contradict code execution logs, plus one nonexistent future citation. Severity is high due to fabricated metrics and significance claims.
